hero.title: Our Rich Heritage
hero.subtitle: Nearly a century of educational excellence, rooted in Edmund Rice values and committed to nurturing generations of compassionate leaders.

edmundRiceValues.title: Edmund Rice Legacy
edmundRiceValues.description: Our school is built on the educational philosophy of Blessed Edmund Rice, who dedicated his life to providing quality education to young people, especially those from disadvantaged backgrounds.

values.title: Compassion
values.description: Teaching students to care for others and show empathy in all relationships

values.title: Justice
values.description: Promoting fairness, equality, and standing up for what is right

values.title: Respect
values.description: Honoring the dignity of every person regardless of background or circumstances

values.title: Liberation
values.description: Empowering students through education to achieve their full potential

timeline.title: Journey Through Time
timeline.description: Explore the key milestones and transformative moments that have shaped our institution into what it is today.

events.title: Foundation Years
events.subtitle: The Beginning of Excellence
events.description: Our school was established as part of the educational mission to provide quality education grounded in strong values.

events.title: Growth & Recognition
events.subtitle: Building Foundations
events.description: The school gained recognition for its academic excellence and character formation during challenging times.

events.title: Post-Independence Era
events.subtitle: Serving New India
events.description: As India gained independence, our school played a crucial role in educating the leaders of tomorrow.

events.title: Contemporary Excellence
events.subtitle: Leading Educational Innovation
events.description: Today, our school stands as a beacon of educational excellence, combining traditional values with modern pedagogy.

milestones.title: Historic Milestones
milestones.description: Key achievements and pivotal moments that define our journey of excellence.

achievements.title: Our Achievements
achievements.description: Recognition and accomplishments that reflect our commitment to excellence across academics, sports, and community service.

items: 100% Board Pass Rate for consecutive years

quote.text: The mind once enlightened cannot again become dark.
quote.author: Blessed Edmund Rice

callToAction.title: Continue Our Legacy
callToAction.description: Join our family and become part of our continuing story of excellence, values, and service to humanity.
